prompt: Create a new user with email "ada@example.com" and name "Ada", and return the created user.
Create a user with email "grace@example.com" and, in the same call, create a related profile with bio "Hello". Return the user.
Find the user whose email is "ada@example.com" (email is unique) and return it (or null).
Return all published posts ordered by title ascending.
Set name to "Ada L." for the user with email "ada@example.com" and return the updated user.
Upsert a user by unique email "ada@example.com": if it exists set name to "Ada", otherwise create it with that email and name. Return the user.
Return the user with email "ada@example.com" including their posts.
Return the first 10 posts after the post with id 100 using cursor-based pagination, ordered by id ascending.
In a single transaction, create a user with email "tx@example.com" and then a post titled "First" authored by that user. Return both.
Return the number of published posts.
